zh.lifeSummary: Gilbert Adam De Bostock是Roger Bostock的兒子，於1130年出生在英國爾達文哈姆。他與Amicia de Mainwarming結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1194年在英國爾切斯特享年64歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bostock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Bostock in Cheshire (Botestoch in Domesday Book), so named with an Old English personal name Bōta (see Bott ) + Old English stoc ‘place’.

variants.name: Bostwick
meanings: English (Yorkshire): in northwestern England perhaps a variant of Bostock , and in southeastern England a variant of Bastick (see Bostick 1) with rounding of the vowel.

variants.name: Bott
meanings: English: nickname from Old French bot ‘toad’ (compare Bottrell ). Alternatively, from the Middle English personal name Botte (a survival of Old English Botta). Compare Botting .
South German: occupational name for a messenger, from Middle High German bote ‘messenger, emissary’.

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Gilbert Adam De Bostock was born in 1130, in Davenham, Cheshire, England as the son of Roger Bostock. He married Amicia de Mainwarming. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1194, in Chester, Cheshire, England, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Gilbert Adam De Bostock est né en 1130, à Davenham, Cheshire, Angleterre, fils de Roger Bostock. Il a épousé Amicia de Mainwarming. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1194, à Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Gilbert Adam De Bostock wurde 1130 in Davenham, Cheshire, England, als Sohn von Roger Bostock geboren. Er hat Amicia de Mainwarming geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1194 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Chester, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert Adam De Bostockは1130年にイギリスチェシュアイアダベンハムでRoger Bostockの息子として生まれた。Amicia de Mainwarmingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1194年にイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert Adam De Bostock(은)는 1130년 영국 체실르 대븐함에서 Roger Bostock의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Amicia de Mainwarming(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1194년 영국 체실르 체스터에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.
